channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Minecraft Color Formatter - Sat May 09 10:58:59 UTC 2026
item.description:
Syntax highlighting for Minecraft legacy color codes (Bedrock palette) inside Java and Kotlin string literals. Features Real-time preview of § color codes in string...
vendor: WanMine downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: net.wanmine.mccolor

item.title: Nuxt Pro - Fri May 08 06:42:45 UTC 2026
item.description:
Nuxt Pro adds first-class Nuxt 4 support to IntelliJ-based IDEs. It detects Nuxt workspaces, understands Nuxt config and ignore files, exposes Vetur compatibility...
vendor: Jetplugins downloads: 1 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: dev.jetplugins.nuxt

item.title: Obfuscation Pro - Fri May 08 03:25:57 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Jetplugins downloads: 1 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: dev.jetplugins.obfuscation-pro

item.title: AiBridge - Thu May 07 21:22:31 UTC 2026

AiBridge turns your JetBrains IDE into a local AI gateway. It exposes the language models available via GitHub Copilot (and other providers) as a standard...
vendor: Giona Granchelli downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.aibridge

item.title: Maven Consistency Enforcer - Fri May 08 07:17:35 UTC 2026

vendor: finncu downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.silverhorn.fca.maven-consistency-enforcer

item.description:
